title: lachnorhiza micrantha
intro: Lachnorhiza micrantha is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Lachnorhiza micrantha include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
